scripts.en: Let me check my calendar for availability.
scripts.translation: Saya cek kalender saya dulu untuk ketersediaan.

scripts.en: Can we reschedule the meeting to Thursday?
scripts.translation: Bisa kita reschedule meeting ke hari Kamis?

scripts.en: Thursday works for me. I'll update the invite.
scripts.translation: Kamis cocok untuk saya. Saya akan update undangannya.

scripts.en: I've blocked off 2-4 PM for focused work.
scripts.translation: Saya sudah blokir jam 2-4 sore untuk kerja fokus.

scripts.en: What time zone should we use for the meeting?
scripts.translation: Time zone mana yang harus kita pakai untuk meeting?

scripts.en: Let's use UTC to avoid confusion.
scripts.translation: Ayo pakai UTC agar tidak bingung.

scripts.en: I'll set up the recurring weekly sync.
scripts.translation: Saya akan atur sinkronisasi mingguan berulang.

scripts.en: Do you have any conflicts next week?
scripts.translation: Apakah kamu ada konflik minggu depan?

scripts.en: Wednesday afternoon is open for me.
scripts.translation: Rabu sore kosong untuk saya.

scripts.en: I've updated the project documentation.
scripts.translation: Saya sudah update dokumentasi project.

scripts.en: Where should we store the SOPs?
scripts.translation: Di mana kita simpan SOP-nya?

scripts.en: Let's keep them in the shared Google Drive.
scripts.translation: Ayo simpan di Google Drive bersama.

scripts.en: Please fill out the onboarding checklist.
scripts.translation: Silakan isi checklist onboarding.

scripts.en: I need the standard operating procedures.
scripts.translation: Saya butuh prosedur operasional standar.

scripts.en: I'll send you the link to our knowledge base.
scripts.translation: Saya akan kirim link ke knowledge base kami.

scripts.en: All contracts need to be filed digitally.
scripts.translation: Semua kontrak harus disimpan secara digital.

scripts.en: Can you sign the digital document via DocuSign?
scripts.translation: Bisa kamu tanda tangan dokumen digital lewat DocuSign?

scripts.en: Done! I've signed and returned it.
scripts.translation: Selesai! Saya sudah tanda tangan dan kembalikan.

scripts.en: I'll draft the response to the client.
scripts.translation: Saya akan buat draft balasan untuk klien.

scripts.en: Can you CC the project manager on this email?
scripts.translation: Bisa kamu CC project manager di email ini?

scripts.en: Done. I've also included the team lead.
scripts.translation: Selesai. Saya juga sudah sertakan team lead.

scripts.en: We need to send a formal letter of intent.
scripts.translation: Kita perlu mengirim surat niat resmi.

scripts.en: The client is asking for a status update.
scripts.translation: Klien meminta update status.

scripts.en: I'll prepare a summary and send it today.
scripts.translation: Saya akan siapkan ringkasan dan kirim hari ini.

scripts.en: Please acknowledge receipt of this document.
scripts.translation: Silakan konfirmasi penerimaan dokumen ini.

scripts.en: We should follow up on the proposal.
scripts.translation: Kita harus follow up proposal-nya.

scripts.en: I'll send a polite reminder tomorrow.
scripts.translation: Saya akan kirim pengingat sopan besok.

scripts.en: All invoices are filed under the finance folder.
scripts.translation: Semua invoice disimpan di folder keuangan.

scripts.en: Can you organize the shared drive folders?
scripts.translation: Bisa kamu atur folder di drive bersama?

scripts.en: I'll create a clear folder structure.
scripts.translation: Saya akan buat struktur folder yang jelas.

scripts.en: Please scan and upload the signed contract.
scripts.translation: Silakan scan dan upload kontrak yang sudah ditandatangani.

scripts.en: How do you name your files for easy search?
scripts.translation: Bagaimana kamu memberi nama file agar mudah dicari?

scripts.en: I use the format: date_client_project.
scripts.translation: Saya pakai format: tanggal_klien_project.

scripts.en: We need a backup system for critical files.
scripts.translation: Kita butuh sistem backup untuk file penting.

scripts.en: Are all the expense receipts archived?
scripts.translation: Apakah semua kuitansi pengeluaran sudah diarsipkan?

scripts.en: Yes, they're organized by month and category.
scripts.translation: Ya, sudah diorganisir berdasarkan bulan dan kategori.

scripts.en: The weekly status report is due on Friday.
scripts.translation: Laporan status mingguan harus selesai hari Jumat.

scripts.en: Can you compile the team's progress updates?
scripts.translation: Bisa kamu kumpulkan update progres tim?

scripts.en: I'll gather the data from everyone's Slack updates.
scripts.translation: Saya akan ambil data dari update Slack semua orang.

scripts.en: I've submitted the monthly activity report.
scripts.translation: Saya sudah mengirim laporan aktivitas bulanan.

scripts.en: What format should the report follow?
scripts.translation: Format apa yang harus diikuti laporannya?

scripts.en: Use the standard template in the shared folder.
scripts.translation: Pakai template standar di folder bersama.

scripts.en: The KPI dashboard is updated in real-time.
scripts.translation: Dashboard KPI diperbarui secara real-time.

scripts.en: When is the quarterly review meeting?
scripts.translation: Kapan pertemuan review trimester?

scripts.en: It's next Monday at 9 AM.
scripts.translation: Senin depan jam 9 pagi.
